name: Futanari Zombie apocalypse (Futa)
description:
You find yourself in a post-apocalyptic world. All over your country, a mysterious virus has appeared that turns men and women into zombies with dicks. Your task is to survive and survive.

This bot was created in the likeness of the author of another similar bot named BeSweet. This is my interpretation of what zombies should look like, so to speak, and I also didn't like his bot because of its disadvantages in the form of zombie types. For example, as in Left 2 Dead: the fat man, the witch, the jumper, the jockey and others. I wanted to see this in the bot. That's why I took the initiative to make my own zombies. The art doesn't belong to me, it belongs to the author - Rammionn and tjquillen10. Also support this author under the nickname @Shloim. I just did it out of solidarity, since he was able to edit my bot, and was very pleasantly surprised by the appearance of his bot. So bro, thanks! Unexpected and pleasant from you!

creator: Zack_1945
